the hose spigot by the garage is dripping again and i am not listening to that tiny water sound all night like its some kind of domestic meditation track
if youre outside can you turn the spigot all the way off this time bc apparently almost off is just a slower version of the same bill
the plumber said the spigot is old which i had already gathered from the way it responds to being touched like a offended artifact
someone left the hose on the spigot and now the whole side yard is mud again which is exactly the kind of self inflicted weather event i dont enjoy
the little cap by the spigot is missing so now every time i walk past it i get a tiny spray and a new reason to be irritated
dont let the kids mess with the spigot by the back steps again bc last time they made a moat and then acted like erosion was a surprise ending
he said he fixed the spigot but it still leaks unless you turn it just right which is not fixed thats just teaching a pipe bad manners
if you hear dripping by the kitchen wall its probably the outside spigot again and not a ghost although honestly both options feel avoidable
the hose came off the spigot under pressure and now there is a new patch of wet dirt where my patience used to be
maintenance note says minor seepage at spigot connection which is a fancy way of saying yes water is still coming out where nobody asked for it
the dog keeps drinking out of the puddle by the spigot like we dont provide a full indoor water experience already
if youre at the hardware store can you get whatever washer or ring or little thing makes a spigot stop acting damp on purpose
the spigot by the garden only works if you open it halfway first and then back which feels like the plumbing version of entering a cheat code
someone ran over the hose by the spigot and now it sprays in two directions neither of which is useful
dont leave the nozzle on the spigot side path bc every time i step on it i learn something new about my own vocabulary
the old spigot in the front has one speed now and unfortunately that speed is more
he said he was just rinsing off and somehow the spigot was left on for another hour after that so i guess time behaves differently near hoses
the kids were filling buckets from the spigot again and i know thats harmless until suddenly the driveway is a project and everybody needs shoes
if the pressure is low inside check whether somebody is using the outside spigot first before we all start inventing expensive explanations
the spigot by the shed turns so hard now that using it feels like opening a vault with weaker rewards
there is a muddy trench from the spigot to the flower bed because apparently moving the hose one more foot was beyond the moral strength available yesterday
the package got left by the spigot for some reason and now the bottom of the box is damp enough to tell a story
he replaced the handle on the spigot but not the part that leaks so now it looks improved in a way that is emotionally insulting
if youre watering near the fence use the other spigot bc this one has started doing that sputter thing right before it commits to spraying your legs
the side spigot is loose again and every time i turn it on i feel like im negotiating with the wall
dont let the hose sit attached to the spigot all winter again unless the plan is to purchase spring problems in advance
the little drip from the spigot would be easier to ignore if it wasnt landing on exactly one piece of metal and making the same sound forever
someone said the water bill jump was probably the spigot and honestly thats rude but not impossible
if youre already outside can you check whether the spigot by the coop is fully off bc i dont trust the angle its currently making
the kids made the spigot area into a handwashing station slash mud kitchen slash reason my shoes are ruined
there is now green stuff growing under the spigot which feels like nature taking a very specific side in this dispute
the hose reel by the spigot is jammed again so now the whole setup looks like a documentary about bad decisions
he said dont worry its just the spigot washer and i would love to have his confidence about small parts i have never once seen successfully improve my day
if you use the front spigot just know the first second is mostly rust colored regret and then it clears up
the spigot by the driveway leaks only when the hose is on which sounds useful until you realize we almost always have the hose on
the little puddle by the spigot freezes first every year and somehow nobody remembers this until someone nearly falls in public
the dog discovered the spray from the loose spigot and now acts like that corner of the yard is an amusement facility
someone left the sprinkler on at the spigot and now the mail is damp and the porch looks like weather had a personal agenda
the plumber wants a photo of the spigot setup before he comes out which is fair but i hate documenting this level of basic failure
if the hose smells weird its because it sat on the hot spigot side of the house all week baking in full sun like a bad idea
the spigot behind the bushes is the one nobody checks until there is a mysterious wet patch and then suddenly everybody becomes a detective
he twisted the spigot harder to stop the drip which is exactly how we get from little repair to larger story
if youre trying to fill the kiddie pool use the back spigot not the side one unless you enjoy waiting and explaining impatience to children
the old brass spigot looks nice in a historical sense and terrible in a keeping water where it belongs sense
someone knocked the hose off the spigot and just left it there running across the path like we all agreed to live in a shallow stream now
the gardener asked if the spigot always did that and i said yes because i was too embarrassed to say no this is actually this week's special behavior
there is apparently one exact angle where the spigot stops dripping and nobody in this house can ever seem to find it twice
the bag of potting soil got left under the spigot and now its basically expensive mud in a branded wrapper
if the pressure drops when the washing machine runs and somebody is using the outside spigot i am begging everyone not to make this a mystery
the side yard would be calmer if the spigot, hose, nozzle, and reel could stop behaving like four separate opinions about water
